docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00 SERVED OCT-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ALAN
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHANI, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ALAN CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-18-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOHN STEPHANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALAN FERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AMONGST THEMSELVES AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT ON 02/06/18 ORDERED DESTROYED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOHN STEPHANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ATTEMPTED TO FILE A REQUEST TO APPEAR BY PHONE BUT WAS TARDY WITH HIS REQUEST AND SUBSEQUENTLY MAILED IN A REQUEST TO POSTPONE WHICH WAS ALSO TARDY. JUDGE CASTELLANOS DECIDED TO CONTINUE THE MATTER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED VIA MAIL ONLY. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ALAN
